msg: Reading story-001-pipeline-status-dashboard.md and codebase to produce plan

Writing 5 acceptance test scenarios from story ACs

AC1: board watcher fires → renderWorkflows re-runs → step status updates without polling. AC2: in_progress step → spinner + latest log. AC3: done step → green check + elapsed. AC4: failed step → red X + output. AC5: all done → bar at 100%
Test plan written, compile check is the automated gate
